## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows `guardrails/coding-rules.md`
- [ ] All tokens used from `src/tokens/index.ts` (no hardcoded hex/px values)
- [ ] Components are typed — no `any`
- [ ] New components have a unit test in `tests/unit/`
- [ ] Tested on iOS simulator
- [ ] Tested on Android emulator
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
